3 Minutes Timer

A free online 3 Minutes countdown timer. Click Start and keep this tab open.

3 Minutes

About the 3 Minutes Timer

A 3 minute timer suits french press coffee brewing, a short meditation session, timed speaking practice, or a quick plank hold. Three minutes feels short until you're doing it.
